falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by 15% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a strong bullish trend contradicting the blowoff pattern's expectation of a reversal

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume exceeds 200% of the 30-day average on three consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volume would invalidate the blowoff score's implication of waning momentum

falsification_conditions.condition: The 14-period RSI (Relative Strength Index) remains above 75 for 7 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would contradict the pattern's historical precedent of oversold conditions in the Luna bottom scenario

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
